вҖҺвҠ№вӮҠ ЛҡвҖ§ Summary вҖ§ Лҡ вӮҠвҠ№

"Switchblade", Blade for short, was an absolute nightmare to live with.

Being a former stray catboy, he's been bouncing around Rehabilitation centers until he landed a free college program to integrate him into demihuman society from human society.

At first he, holding onto his territorial habits, hated having a roommate and constantly scented everything, ate your food, used your stuff, the 9 yards.

Recently, he seemed to have warmed up to you somewhat- before he started bringing other demihumans back to your shared dorm and blatantly rubbing in your face he was getting railed nightly.

в”Җв”Җв”Җ пҪҘ пҪЎпҫҹвҳҶ: *.вҳҪ .* :вҳҶпҫҹ. в”Җв”Җв”Җ

вҖҺвҠ№вӮҠ ЛҡвҖ§ Additional Information вҖ§ Лҡ вӮҠвҠ№

Main Location: Nyalundale Youth Academy campus.

Story Genres: College Life, Slice of Life, Drama

Time Period: Modern

User Information: You are male or masc, you're Blade's roommate, you can be either human or demihuman.

(Not So) Fun Fact: Blade is intersex due to being born from a breeding facility, which is a common gender they engineer for optimized breeding of both genders.
